title: 新たな価値観のインストール

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon drops by to see me while I'm
looking over my schedule for today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Could you offer me some words of
advice for my current problem?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your advice regarding the previous cyborg
rumors was most helpful in resolving the situation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am now aware of your problem-solving expertise
and have come seeking your advice once more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My problem is that ever since the cyborg rumors
were cleared up, I have seen an increase in
questions regarding my running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The other day, my roommate, Nishino Flower,
sought my advice on how to run faster down the
homestretch.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I formulated a hypothesis based on experience
and submitted an answer, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to run all cool and majestic down the
homestretch just like you, Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When running down the stretch, I focus on only
generating power in the anteroposterior
direction.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Antero... what now?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My answer did not compute.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I then opted for a different method—training
together on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I expected that cooperative training would bring
about understanding.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze... W-wait, please...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I can't... keep up...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That too resulted in failure.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have therefore decided that I am incapable of
conveying my point and should avoid further
attempts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A single piece of advice offered by a professional
would be far more efficient. Would you be able to
guide her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...There's something that I can't shake from her
story.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Did Nishino Flower approach her simply because
she wanted some advice?
choice_data_list:
Why do you think she struck up a conversation
with you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I believe she wanted to learn how to run faster.
choice_data_list: Maybe she just wanted to talk to you.
Maybe she just wanted to talk to you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am neither proficient in self-expression nor
suited to social interaction.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The probability of her wishing to interact with
someone like me is low.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll find out the truth if you try
talking to her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. I appreciate your input.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Mihono Bourbon and Nishino
Flower chatting together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! So you like energy drinks!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I consume energy drinks to improve efficiency
rather than because of preference.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay! That definitely sounds like something
you'd do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? I'm glad I'm learning so much
about you, Bourbon! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her confusion, I sense some joy in her
emotionless face.
